title: Grand Theft Auto IV Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Rockstar's grounded Liberty City epic follows Niko Bellic through a cover-shooter open world with Euphoria physics, moral choice missions, and a satirical take on the American dream.
narrative.core_loop: Take missions from contacts, drive and shoot through Liberty City, manage wanted levels, and progress Niko's story through branching moral choices.

mechanics.map_notes: Free-roam Liberty City with mission markers and phone-initiated jobs.
mechanics.expression: Free-roam Liberty City with mission markers and phone-initiated jobs.

mechanics.map_notes: Story and side missions unlock via phone contacts and location visits.
mechanics.expression: Story and side missions unlock via phone contacts and location visits.

mechanics.map_notes: Wanted levels escalate police response based on visible crimes.
mechanics.expression: Wanted levels escalate police response based on visible crimes.

mechanics.map_notes: Health depletes from gunfire; rest and food restore pools.
mechanics.expression: Health depletes from gunfire; rest and food restore pools.

mechanics.map_notes: Hand-to-hand and melee weapons offer close-range options.
mechanics.expression: Hand-to-hand and melee weapons offer close-range options.

mechanics.map_notes: Cover-based shooting fires on aim with recoil and reload cycles.
mechanics.expression: Cover-based shooting fires on aim with recoil and reload cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Side activities, collectibles, and random events fill the open world.
mechanics.expression: Side activities, collectibles, and random events fill the open world.

mechanics.map_notes: Traffic, water, and fall damage constrain traversal choices.
mechanics.expression: Traffic, water, and fall damage constrain traversal choices.

mechanics.map_notes: Key story confrontations span chase and shootout phases.
mechanics.expression: Key story confrontations span chase and shootout phases.

mechanics.map_notes: Mission retry from last checkpoint on failure.
mechanics.expression: Mission retry from last checkpoint on failure.

mechanics.map_notes: Safehouse saves and weapon pickups gate combat readiness.
mechanics.expression: Safehouse saves and weapon pickups gate combat readiness.

mechanics.map_notes: Gang shootouts follow cover-and-flank encounter loops.
mechanics.expression: Gang shootouts follow cover-and-flank encounter loops.

mechanics.map_notes: Hospital respawn on death with mission restart options.
mechanics.expression: Hospital respawn on death with mission restart options.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Grand Theft Auto IV through its core action-adventure loop.
